steps.title: Locate the minimum distance traveled in each sex's column
steps.content: Females traveled 9.28 km/day (cold-dry), 12.64 km/day (monsoon), and 12.48 km/day (hot-dry). Males traveled 15.81 km/day (cold-dry), 18.87 km/day (hot-dry), and 18.93 km/day (monsoon).

steps.title: Match the lowest season for each sex to the answer choices
steps.content: The cold-dry season produced the minimum distance for both females and males. The other choices pair different seasons across the sexes or identify periods with higher travel. That matches choice A — A is correct.
